debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
S : List (Call n)
S_noHo : noHo n S
k : Fin n
h : isExpert (after n S) k
h2 : allKnow (after n S) k
⊢ 2 * n - 2 - v n S k ≤ S.length

failed_attempts:
exact Nat.sub_le (2 * n - 2) (v S k)
  have h1 : 2 * n - 2 ≤ 2 * S.length := by
    have : 2 * (n - 1) < 2 * S.length := by
      exact Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hlen (by decide : 0 < (2:Nat))
    simpa [two_mul, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, Nat.sub_eq, Nat.add_sub_cancel] using (Nat.le_of_lt this)
  have h2' : 2 * n - 2 ≤ S.length := by
    exact le_trans h1 (by
      have : 2 * S.length ≤ S.length + S.length := by simp [two_mul]
      exact le_trans this (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using Nat.le_add_left S.length S.length))
  exact le_trans this h2'

have hv : v S k ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
    have : 2 * n - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * n - 2 := Nat.sub_le_sub_left (Nat.zero_le _) _
    have : 2 * n - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * (n - 1) := by
      simpa [two_mul, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, Nat.sub_eq, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm,
        Nat.add_comm, Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub, Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_self, Nat.zero_add] using this
    exact le_trans this (by
      have : 2 * (n - 1) ≤ n - 1 := by
        simpa using (Nat.mul_le_of_le_one_left (Nat.zero_le _) (by decide : (2:Nat) ≤ 1))
      exact this)
  exact le_trans hlow (Nat.le_of_lt hn1)

have : 2 * n - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * S.length := le_trans hv hn
  exact le_trans this (by
    have : S.length ≤ 2 * S.length := by
      simpa [two_mul] using (Nat.le_add_left (S.length) (S.length))
    exact this)

have h1 : n - 1 ≤ S.length := Nat.le_of_lt hn1
    have h2' : n - 1 ≤ S.length := Nat.le_of_lt hn2
    have : 2 * n - 2 = (n - 1) + (n - 1) := by
      omega
    rw [this]
    have : (n - 1) + (n - 1) ≤ S.length + S.length := Nat.add_le_add h1 h2'
    have : (n - 1) + (n - 1) ≤ S.length + v S k + S.length := by
      exact le_trans this (by
        simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
          Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.le_add_left (S.length) (v S k)) S.length)
    simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
      le_trans this (by
        have : S.length + v S k + S.length = S.length + S.length + v S k := by
          omega
        simp [this, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm])
  exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hn)
simpa [v] using noHo_exp_and_known_needs_many_calls (n := n) (S := S) S_noHo k h h2

have : 2 * n - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * n - 2 := Nat.sub_le _ _
  exact le_trans this (by
    have : 2 * n - 2 ≤ 2 * S.length := by
      nlinarith
    exact le_trans this (by
      have : 2 * S.length ≤ S.length := by
        exact le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _)))
      exact this))

exact le_trans hv (le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp [two_mul])) (by
    have : 2 * n - 2 ≤ 2 * S.length := by
      simpa [two_mul] using hsum'
    exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (le_trans this (by simp [two_mul])))))

have : 2 * n - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * n - 2 := Nat.sub_le _ _
    have : 2 * n - 2 ≤ n := by
      exact le_trans (Nat.sub_le _ _) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (by decide))
    exact le_trans this (le_of_eq (by ring))
  exact le_trans hbound hnn

have hv : v S k ≤ 2 * n - 2 := Nat.le_trans (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.le_refl _)
    exact Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add'.2 <| by
      have : 2 * n - 2 ≤ (n - 1) + v S k := by
        exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by ring)) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm] using this
  exact le_trans this (Nat.le_of_lt hn)

exact Nat.sub_le (2 * n - 2) (v S k)
  have h2n : 2 * n - 2 ≤ 2 * S.length := by
    have hn' : n ≤ S.length + 1 := hn
    have : 2 * n ≤ 2 * (S.length + 1) := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 hn'
    have : 2 * n - 2 ≤ 2 * (S.length + 1) - 2 := Nat.sub_le_sub_right this 2
    simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_sub_cancel] using this
  have hlen : 2 * S.length ≤ S.length := by
    exact Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.zero_le _)) |> (by
      intro h; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.zero_le _))) )
  exact le_trans (le_trans hle h2n) (by
    simpa using (Nat.le_add_left S.length S.length))
